steps.name: canonical-document-contract
steps.summary: Defined versioned renderer-independent document types, validator, and 1k/5k fixtures.

steps.name: deterministic-operation-runtime
steps.summary: Added pure operations, inverse operations, structural-sharing view updates, undo/redo, and deterministic replay.

steps.name: semantic-dom-content-plane
steps.summary: Rendered every canonical node to semantic DOM with stable ID, source, focus, and composition contracts.

steps.name: webgpu-editor-plane-fallback
steps.summary: Added validation-clean WebGPU selection/guides and convergent DOM fallback for adapter, validation, and device-loss failure.

steps.name: persistence-and-integrated-proof
steps.summary: Proved checksum snapshot recovery, post-reload undo/redo, 5k interaction budget, zero pixel drift, and real Chrome flow.
